sql_array: CREATE TABLE geolocation (id Int32, geohash String);
UPDATE geolocation SET geohash = geohashEncode(10.123456, 50.123456, 5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, geohash, geohashEncode(45.321, -75.123, 8) AS new_geohash FROM geolocation;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geolocation WHERE geohash = geohashEncode(-180, 90, 12);
